title: Planore
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image= |name=Planore |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns=He/him''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I suspect Planore scammed you.''"
"''I was afraid of that. I knew I shouldn't have trusted him.|Meetra Surik and Kahranna|}} '''Planore''' was an individual who, in [[3951 BBY]],''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' offered to arrange [[Transport/Legends|transport]] off the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] for the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Kahranna]] and her family. He charged Kahranna fifty [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for a referral to his [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] friend, whom he claimed would take the family off world for 500 credits. However, Planore never came through with his offer of assistance. {{GameLSmechanics|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords}} During that time, Kahranna was forced to rely on [[Meetra Surik]]''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]''—a former [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] otherwise known as the Jedi Exile—for help. After hearing the Human's story, Surik expressed that Planore may have scammed her; Kahranna agreed, noting she should not have trusted him. {{Endgame}} ==Behind the scenes== Planore was mentioned in the [[2004]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', developed by [[Obsidian Entertainment]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Planore#legends }} [[Category:Criminals]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]]
